ddls:
CREATE TABLE "state_crime_data" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "violent_crime" INTEGER /* Total number of violent crimes */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of violent crimes per 100,000 population */,
  "murder_manslaughter" INTEGER /* Total number of murders and manslaughters */,
  "murder_manslaughter_rate" REAL /* Rate of murders and manslaughters per 100,000 population */,
  "rape" INTEGER /* Total number of rapes */,
  "rape_rate" REAL /* Rate of rapes per 100,000 population */,
  "robbery" INTEGER /* Total number of robberies */,
  "robbery_rate" REAL /* Rate of robberies per 100,000 population */,
  "aggravated_assault" INTEGER /* Total number of aggravated assaults */,
  "aggravated_assault_rate" REAL /* Rate of aggravated assaults per 100,000 population */,
  "property_crime" INTEGER /* Total number of property crimes */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of property crimes per 100,000 population */,
  "burglary" INTEGER /* Total number of burglaries */,
  "burglary_rate" REAL /* Rate of burglaries per 100,000 population */,
  "larceny_theft" INTEGER /* Total number of larcenies and thefts */,
  "larceny_theft_rate" REAL /* Rate of larcenies and thefts per 100,000 population */,
  "motor_vehicle_theft" INTEGER /* Total number of motor vehicle thefts */,
  "motor_vehicle_theft_rate" REAL /* Rate of motor vehicle thefts per 100,000 population */,
  "total_crime" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes */,
  "total_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of total crimes per 100,000 population */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the state belongs to */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* The specific date of the crime */,
  "crime_location" TEXT /* The specific location where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the crime */,
  "crime_status" TEXT /* The current status of the crime */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a suspect if applicable */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* The number of victims involved in the crime */,
  "arrest_count" INTEGER /* The number of arrests made in relation to the crime */,
  "clearance_status" TEXT /* Whether the crime has been cleared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year", "crime_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_crime_data_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_crime_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* The population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* The area of the region in square miles or kilometers */,
  "region_density" REAL /* The population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "crime_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the crime */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* The broader category of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* The user's position or role within the department */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* The user's contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being accessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_crime_data ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES state_crime_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Full name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the suspect */,
  "suspect_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "suspect_race" TEXT /* Race of the suspect */,
  "suspect_address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "suspect_status" TEXT /* Current status of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "victim_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "victim_race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "victim_address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "victim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_suspects" (
  "crime_suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-suspect relationship */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the crime */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suspect */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* The date of the crime */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* The date of arrest, if applicable */,
  "charge" TEXT /* The charge against the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspects_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspects_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_crime_data ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspects_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES state_crime_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_victims" (
  "crime_victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-victim relationship */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the crime */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the victim */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* The date of the crime */,
  "victim_status" TEXT /* The status of the victim at the time of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_victims_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES state_crime_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_victims_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_victims_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_crime_data ("state_id")
)
